mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_hypothesis (id, task_id, run_id, type, status, claim, primary_chunk_id, evidence_chunk_ids, confidence, critic_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{taskId}, #{runId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{claim}, #{primaryChunkId}, #{evidenceChunkIds}, #{confidence}, #{criticReason}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_hypothesis SET status=#{status}, confidence=#{confidence}, critic_reason=#{criticReason}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, run_id, type, status, claim, primary_chunk_id, evidence_chunk_ids, confidence, critic_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM audit_hypothesis WHERE task_id=#{taskId} ORDER BY created_at
